testcase.name: test_start_game_without_autodarts_url
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_autodarts_integration.py:73: in test_start_game_without_autodarts_url assert start_response.status_code == 200, f"Start game failed: {start_response.text}" E AssertionError: Start game failed: {"detail":"No credits remaining"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_start_game_with_autodarts_url

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'https://play.autodarts.io/test-board' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcbe042ce280>('autodarts_target_url') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcbe042ce280> = {'active_session': {'board_id': '5c6b8e7d-584e-4f5a-8669-acff6c308e87', 'credits_remaining': 0, 'credits_total': 0, 'ended_at': None, ...}, 'board': {'board_id': 'BOARD-1', 'created_at': '2026-03-03T22:37:45.219233', 'id': '5c6b8e7d-584e-4f5a-8669-acff6c308e87', 'is_master': True, ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_autodarts_integration.py:104: in test_start_game_with_autodarts_url assert board_data.get("autodarts_target_url") == "https://play.autodarts.io/test-board" E AssertionError: assert None == 'https://play.autodarts.io/test-board' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcbe042ce280>('autodarts_target_url') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcbe042ce280> = {'active_session': {'board_id': '5c6b8e7d-584e-4f5a-8669-acff6c308e87', 'credits_remaining': 0, 'credits_total': 0, 'ended_at': None, ...}, 'board': {'board_id': 'BOARD-1', 'created_at': '2026-03-03T22:37:45.219233', 'id': '5c6b8e7d-584e-4f5a-8669-acff6c308e87', 'is_master': True, ...}}.get

testcase.name: test_end_game_creates_match_result
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_autodarts_integration.py:183: in test_end_game_creates_match_result assert unlock_response.status_code == 200, f"Unlock failed: {unlock_response.text}" E AssertionError: Unlock failed: {"detail":"Board already has an active session"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
